Watched the whole thing there’s a few that are funny, but like 80-90 percent of the skits are horrible and truly not funny. 

Similar to Burt’s new special, there’s one theme that carries throughout almost every skit, sex, degradation, and humiliation. There’s several moments in these episodes that I’m honestly surprised Netflix even allowed to air, they are that graphic. 

Jokes about elder sexual abuse, graphic depictions of him having sex with conjoined twins, and many other pretty much over the top scenarios. One In which he basically rips off an old Joe Rogan skit about taking something that makes your penis grow until you have to throw it over your shoulder, but along with this inappropriate sexual humor being the theme throughout, the other theme that continues throughout is bad jokes, and sophomoric gross out humor. It’s like watching a more inappropriate, and less funny Dirty Work, and that’s saying a lot. 

Good production value, and actually some pretty decent acting from the other cast members helped in a few of the skits, but I had to force myself to keep watching just to get through it…truly it’s not  good overall, and the constant bad sex jokes made me feel like Burt might have helped with the jokes. Do yourself a favor, miss it.
